incompleteSections.title: ERISA / Plan Asset Status — Subscriber Classification (Attachment A, Page 34-35)

Zero checkboxes are selected across the entire group.

items.label: The Subscriber is not purchasing the Interest with funds that constitute the assets of any of the below.
an "employee benefit plan" as defined in Section 3(3) of ERISA that is subject to Title I of ERISA;
a plan that is subject to Code Section 4975 (including an individual retirement account (IRA) or a Keogh plan);
The Subscriber is purchasing the Interest with funds that constitute the assets of:
an entity (including, if applicable, an insurance company general account) whose underlying assets include plan assets...
